data.title: Malbec World Day 2026 Celebrated Globally on April 17 with "Your Malbec, Your Call" Campaign
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Wines of Argentina revealed the upcoming celebration of the 16th edition of Malbec World Day on April 17, 2026. This global event is dedicated to honoring Argentina's prominent varietal, Malbec. Originating in 2011, Malbec World Day has gained significant recognition over the years.

data.title: AI Isn't the Risk, Human Systems Are: Cross-Industry Signals a Leadership Gap
data.description: Recent daily news reports are raising concerns about the potential risks posed by artificial intelligence (AI), including issues like hallucinations, cybersecurity threats, and workforce displacement. While much of the discussion has centered around the technology itself, a comprehensive analysis by JOTO PR across various sectors indicates that the primary concern should not be AI itself but rather the human structures and leadership in place. This analysis underscores the importance of addressing the broader implications and impacts of AI on society and organizations.

data.title: KeyBank Survey: Americans Reimagine the Path to Home Ownership in 2026
data.description: A recent study reveals that 25% of Americans find homeownership to be unattainable. KeyBank's report for 2026 highlights the significance of owning a home in the American dream. The study emphasizes the role of financial institutions and education in bridging this gap. The research was released on April 13, 2026, in Cleveland.

data.title: Gong cha Expands in Southern California with 3-Unit Deal, Taps Multi-Unit Operators
data.description: Three operators have entered into a deal targeting the cities of Fontana, Eastvale, and Jurupa Valley. They will be bringing a portfolio of 26 existing restaurants spanning across various brands. The first location is planned to open in Fontana in the third quarter of 2026. Boston, on April 13, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Gong cha, a prominent bubble tea brand globally, is leading this initiative.

data.title: HungryPanda Celebrates Cultural and Culinary Diversity Across U.S. Cities
data.description: In April 2026, Celebrate Diversity Month is being observed as it has been each year since 2004. In the United States, cities are flourishing as diverse hubs, exemplifying cultural amalgamation. HungryPanda, a global Asian cuisine delivery service, is playing a larger part in linking customers.

data.title: Simpson Manufacturing Co., Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Monday, April 27th
data.description: In Pleasanton, California, on April 13, 2026, Simpson Manufacturing Co., Inc. revealed that it is set to disclose its financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31. As a major player in engineered structural connectors and construction remedies, the Company, identified by the ticker symbol "SSD" on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), is renowned for its industry leadership.

data.title: Hollyland to Showcase New Imaging and Audio Innovations at NAB 2026
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on April 13, 2026, Hollyland, an international company specializing in wireless audio and video solutions, is gearing up to exhibit a wide range of its imaging and audio products at NAB 2026 from April 19 to 22. Visit Booth C4310 at the Las Vegas Convention to explore their offerings.

data.title: Choice Hotels International Brand Sleep Inn Debuts New Design with Openings in Tennessee, Nevada, and Pennsylvania
data.description: In North Bethesda, Maryland, on April 13, 2026, Sleep Inn®, a brand under Choice Hotels International, Inc. (NYSE: CHH), revealed their innovative Scenic Dreams® prototype. This new design focuses on wellness and nature-inspired elements, marking a significant transformation for the brand. Choice Hotels International, Inc. is known as one of the leading lodging franchisors globally.

data.title: DORCO SLEEK Wins iF Design Award 2026; Global Recognition Reinforces Flagship Razor's Market Momentum
data.description: DORCO, a leading South Korean razor manufacturer, has received a Product Design award for its popular razor model SLEEK. The company, recognized as the top-selling razor brand in South Korea according to Euromonitor's data, shared this news from its headquarters in Seoul on April 13, 2026. DORCO's retail presence is growing significantly in key worldwide markets as it continues to expand its global footprint.

data.title: Hydrexia Inks Hydrogen Commercial Contract in Vietnam
data.description: In Kuala Lumpur on April 13, 2026, it was announced that Hydrexia SDN BHD, a company fully owned by Hydrexia Holding Limited, a prominent hydrogen solution provider, and KPT Chemical Group (KPT), a key player in environmental solutions such as air treatment, are joining forces. Hydrexia Holding Limited is known for its integrated hydrogen solutions, while KPT Chemical Group is recognized for its environmental services. This strategic collaboration brings together their expertise in addressing environmental challenges.
Fitch: European defence sector growth since 2022 should continue, annual double-digit order growth expected through at least 2030.

data.title: CareConnect Launches CareConsortium: A First-of-Its-Kind eLearning Consortium Delivering 50%+ Cost Savings Across Homecare, Home Health, and Long-Term Care
data.description: A company called CareConsortium has announced that they are cutting down on duplicate compliance training expenses for agencies, facilities, and care professionals. This decision comes from CareConnect, a prominent provider of mobile care workforce technology, on April 13, 2026. It is aimed at reducing costs for these entities, potentially saving them a significant amount of money.

data.title: NYSE Content Update: U.S.-Based Diversified Energy to Ring Bell for 25 Years Since its Founding
data.description: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issues a pre-market daily advisory straight from the trading floor. On April 13, 2026, NYSE released this update through PRNewswire. This advisory offers insights for the market before the day's trading begins. Investors can access this information for valuable market guidance.
FY 2025-26 Consolidated Financial Results released by Sify.

data.title: New Tiger Group Division Monetizes Surplus Energy and Industrial Equipment for Global Energy Companies
data.description: Tiger Energy, a new global division launched by Tiger Group on April 13, 2026, is strategically situated in key markets spanning from Texas to the UAE. Specializing in asset-monetization and boasting a vast global buyer network, Tiger Energy aims to assist major energy players.

data.title: ibex to Showcase AI-Powered CX Solutions for Utilities at the IUCX Annual Conference 2026
data.description: TAMPA, Florida - On April 13, 2026, ibex (NASDAQ: IBEX), a renowned provider of outsourced business services and AI-driven customer experience solutions, will be attending the IUCX Annual Conference 2026 in Tampa from April 14-16. At the event, the ibex utilities division will present innovative AI-based customer experience solutions designed to facilitate improved communication between utilities and customers, boost engagement levels, and lower operational expenses.

data.title: Data I/O Announces New Vision, New Products and Services, New Look — The NEW Data I/O
data.description: A recently launched website has introduced a new range of services along with the much-anticipated on-site Programming-as-a-Service (PaaS). This launch comes after a long period of anticipation. The website now offers a variety of services to users, and the introduction of PaaS is expected to be a game-changer. This new offering will provide users with the convenience of on-site programming services, enhancing their overall experience. The website's new services and PaaS is set to improve user engagement and satisfaction.

data.title: GCM Grosvenor Hires Michael Albrecht as a Managing Director and Co-Head of Direct Infrastructure Investments, Strengthening Firm’s Infrastructure Capabilities
data.description: In Chicago on April 13, 2026, GCM Grosvenor (Nasdaq: GCMG), a leading global provider of alternative asset management solutions, revealed that Michael Albrecht has become a Managing Director in the firm's Infrastructure division and is now co-leading the direct infrastructure strategy.

data.title: Monroe Capital Corporation Announces Final Distribution Amount and Anticipated Payment Date
data.description: Today, Monroe Capital Corporation (NASDAQ: MRCC) revealed a final distribution of $0.60 per share, pending the completion of its asset sale to Monroe Capital Income Plus Corporation (MCIP) and merger with Horizon Technology Finance Corporation (NASDAQ: HRZN). The conditional distribution payment is slated for around April 17, 2026.
